name: JobCommand-en
ddl: CREATE TABLE "JobCommand-en" (Key INTEGER, "DLCFlags" INTEGER, "IconId" INTEGER, "Name" TEXT, "Description" TEXT, "Description2" TEXT, "Unknown14" INTEGER, "Comment" TEXT, "Unknown1C" INTEGER, "UiDialogId" INTEGER);
rows: Attacks with the equipped weapon, or bare fists if no weapon is equipped.
Squire job command. Comprises the most fundamental of all battle abilities.
Chemist job command. Enables the use of healing items in battle. Chemists can use items on units up to 4 tiles away.
Knight job command. Enables the use of abilities that destroy equipment or devastate attributes. Range is that of the equipped weapon.
Archer job command. Enables attacks that deal damage proportionate to the time spent aiming. Range is that of the equipped weapon.
Monk job command. Comprises a wide range of abilities, including a variety of attacks and simple healing techniques.
White mage job command. Enables the use of healing and strengthening magicks.
Black mage job command. Enables the use of a variety of offensive elemental magicks.
Time mage job command. Enables the use of magicks that affect the movement and turn order of enemies and allies.
Summoner job command. Calls forth espers from the spirit world to unleash a wide range of magicks that distinguish between friend and foe.
Thief job command. Enables the theft of all manner of possessions, from equipment to an enemy's very heart.
Orator job command. Influences the behavior of enemies and allies through the power of spoken words.
Mystic job command. Manipulates the enemy's mind and body to impede their ability to fight.
Geomancer job command. Enables a multitude of attacks that utilize the terrain beneath one's feet.
Dragoon job command. Uses soaring jumps to avoid being targeted before diving down to strike the enemy. Units with higher speed will remain airborne for a shorter time.
Samurai job command. Releases the spirit in a katana to attack enemies and aid allies. This will sometimes break the katana.
Ninja job command. Attacks by throwing weapons or specialized items. Range is that of the unit's movement attribute.
Arithmetician job command. Employs arithmetick algorithms and casts magicks instantaneously.
Bard job command. Sings exquisite melodies in battle to support allies in a variety of ways.
Dancer job command. Performs mysterious dances in battle to hinder the enemy in a variety of ways.
Mime job command. Imitates ally actions automatically. Certain abilities cannot be mimicked.
Ramza's job command. Comprises the essential battle abilities of the squire's Fundaments, and additional techniques unique to Ramza.
Ramza's job command. Comprises the essential battle abilities of the squire's Fundaments, and additional techniques unique to Ramza.
Ramza's gallant knight job command. Comprises the essential battle abilities of the squire's Fundaments, and additional techniques unique to Ramza.
Delita's job command. Comprises the essential battle abilities of the squire's Fundaments, and additional techniques unique to Delita.
Holy knight job command. Comprises sword attacks that inflict status ailments, and additional techniques unique to Delita.
Squire job command. Comprises the most fundamental of all battle abilities, and additional techniques unique to Argath.
Fell knight job command. Attacks opponents while simultaneously stealing their life force. Unit must be equipped with a sword.
Holy knight job command. Smites foes with sword techniques that can also inflict status ailments. Unit must be equipped with a sword or knight's sword.
White knight job command. Attacks opponents while simultaneously inflicting status ailments.
Princess job command. Utilizes powerful magicks for recovery and protection.
Machinist job command. Strikes specific parts of the target's body to impede their movement.
Machinist job command. Strikes specific parts of the target's body to impede their movement.
Fell knight job command. Attacks opponents while simultaneously stealing their life force.
Holy knight job command. Smites foes with sword techniques that can also inflict status ailments. Unit must be equipped with a sword or knight's sword.
Soldier job command. Harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash devastating strikes. Unit must be equipped with a materia blade, a special weapon.
Celebrant job command. Performs magicks that heal wounds and relieve status ailments.
Dragonkin job command. Manifests draconic power to produce myriad miraculous effects.
Holy dragon job command. Annihilates foes with breath attacks in three different elements.
Skyseer job command. Attacks unconventionally with an arcane power distinct from magick, that is uninfluenced by faith.
Netherseer job command. Attacks unconventionally with an otherworldly power distinct from magick, that deals greater damage as faith decreases.
Netherseer job command. Attacks unconventionally with an otherworldly power distinct from magick, that deals greater damage as faith decreases.
Astrologer job command. Harnesses the stars' influence upon men's fates to enact great change upon the battlefield.
Job command for a white knight, now allied to the templarate. Attacks opponents while simultaneously inflicting status ailments.
Cleric job command. Utilizes powerful magicks for recovery and protection.
Skyseer job command. Attacks unconventionally with an arcane power distinct from magick, that is uninfluenced by faith.
Job command for a nightblade of the templarate. Enables the use of skills that destroy equipment or devastate attributes.
Isilud's job command that incorporates aspects of the dragoon. Uses soaring jumps to avoid being targeted before diving down to strike the enemy.
Wiegraf's job command. Born of his own battle experience, it turns bare fists into lethal weapons.
Assassin job command. Inflicts all manner of status ailments to quickly send opponents to their graves.
Assassin job command. Inflicts all manner of status ailments to quickly send opponents to their graves.
Celia's job command that incorporates aspects of the ninja. Attacks by throwing weapons or specialized items.
Lettie's job command that incorporates aspects of the ninja. Attacks by throwing weapons or specialized items.
Job command for a white knight, now allied to the templarate. Attacks opponents while simultaneously inflicting status ailments.
Ark knight job command. Unleashes the seething spirit within a katana as a blast of energy that inflicts various effects on enemies.
Job command for a divine knight of the templarate. Attacks opponents while simultaneously destroying their equipment.
Loffrey's job command that incorporates aspects of the sorcerer. Enables the casting of powerful spells from the pinnacle of all magickal disciplines.
Ark knight job command. Unleashes the seething spirit within a katana as a blast of energy that inflicts various effects on enemies.
Ark knight job command. Absorbs the HP of an adjacent unit and inflicts a status ailment.
Job command for a divine knight of the templarate. Attacks opponents while simultaneously destroying their equipment.
Folmarv's job command that incorporates aspects of the sorcerer. Enables the casting of powerful spells from the pinnacle of all magickal disciplines.
Job command for a divine knight of the templarate. Attacks opponents while simultaneously destroying their equipment.
Job command for a divine knight of the templarate. Smites foes with sword techniques that can also destroy their equipment. Unit must be equipped with a sword or knight's sword.
Job command for a machinist of the templarate. Strikes specific parts of the target's body to impede their movement.
Templar job command. Instantly inflicts status ailments on opponents. Unit must be equipped with a sword or knight's sword.
Rune knight job command. Combines techniques from the Holy Sword and Unyielding Blade job commands.
Dycedarg's job command that incorporates aspects of the sorcerer. Enables the casting of powerful spells from the pinnacle of all magickal disciplines.
Job command for a sorcerer of the templarate. Enables the casting of powerful spells from the pinnacle of all magickal disciplines.
Sword saint job command. The culmination of sword mastery, it enables the use of all sword techniques. Unit must be equipped with a sword or knight's sword.
Ark knight job command. Capable of devastating an opponent's attributes.
Cleric job command. Utilizes powerful magicks for recovery and protection, including some that are unique to Alma.
Knight job command. Enables the use of abilities that destroy equipment or devastate attributes.
Archer job command. Enables attacks that deal damage proportionate to the time spent aiming.
Black mage job command. Enables the use of a variety of offensive elemental magicks.
Time mage job command. Enables the use of magicks that affect the movement and turn order of enemies and allies.
Mystic job command. Manipulates the enemy's mind and body to impede their ability to fight.
Summoner job command. Calls forth espers from the spirit world to unleash a wide range of magicks that distinguish between friend and foe.
Byblos job command. Enables the use of a wide variety of magicks, from offensive to healing.
Automaton job command. Enables attacks from various distances, but at the cost of recoil damage to the unit.
Reaver job command. Uses potent toxic mists that inflict a host of status ailments.
Archaeodaemon job command. Attacks with dread powers that exist only to destroy.
Ultima demon job command. Attacks with fellest powers befitting the wielder's name.
